VisionCell V2

Vision-guided pick-and-place workstation for benchtop assembly.

Specifications

  • Working envelope: 600 mm × 400 mm × 300 mm.
  • Repeatability: 0.02 mm.
  • Vision: 5 MP global-shutter camera with telecentric lens.
  • End effector: vacuum, two-finger gripper, or magnetic — tool-changer included.
  • Footprint: 800 mm × 700 mm; 110 V / 220 V single-phase.

What it costs

Base configuration starts at $42,000 with a ten-week lead time. Volume pricing for fleets of five or more cells is available on request.

Who uses it

Electronics manufacturers, medical-device assembly lines, and university research labs that need a turnkey vision-guided pick-and-place cell without hiring a robotics integrator.
